self_reflection: My solution correctly implemented all 4 pattern conditions with proper logic: (1) bullish/bearish candle detection using open/close comparison and price change thresholds, (2) engulfing condition checking day3_close > day2_open AND day3_open < day2_close, (3) volume increase validation, and (4) MA trend verification (MA5 > MA10 > MA20). However, I found NO matching patterns and output '无符合条件的形态', while GA found one result (300225, 2026-03-13). The key difference is the data source and time period: I used akshare with the task-specified date 2024-04-08, but GA used mootdx which only provides recent 80-day data (2025-12 to 2026-04), so GA scanned a completely different time period (2026 data vs 2024 data). My implementation is technically sound but may have been too strict in filtering, or the 2024-04-08 period genuinely had no matching patterns. The date discrepancy (2026-03-13 in GA's result vs task requirement of 2024-04-08) suggests GA couldn't access historical data and used current data instead.
